articles.title: Finally! Kindle Colorsoft Gets a Dark Mode So You Can Read at Night Without Blinding Anyone
articles.summary: Amazon just added dark mode to its color Kindles. Now you can read in the dark without a bright screen. The update is rolling out today, but you can download it now.

articles.title: A Super-Fast Swimmer Is Switching Teams — and It Could Shake Up College Swimming
articles.summary: Teagan O'Dell, a freshman who scored big at the NCAA championships, is leaving Cal to swim for Virginia. She came in 2nd in the 200 IM and will help Virginia chase its 7th straight title.

articles.title: Push, Don't Pull: Why a Reel Mower Might Be Your Lawn's New Best Friend
articles.summary: Reel mowers cut grass the old-fashioned way — no gas, no batteries. They're quiet, precise, and perfect for small lawns. Check out six top picks, from a 14-inch mini to a 20-inch wide model.
